Floats

Left floated box, 130pt wide, with a couple of lines inside.

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while the five boxing wizards jump quickly and pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs so the layout engine has plenty of prose to wrap tightly around every floated box on this page proving that line boxes shorten and then re-widen once the float has been passed by the flowing text below it. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while the five boxing wizards jump quickly and pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs so the layout engine has plenty of prose to wrap tightly around every floated box on this page proving that line boxes shorten and then re-widen once the float has been passed by the flowing text below it.

Right float + image

Right floated box.

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while the five boxing wizards jump quickly and pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs so the layout engine has plenty of prose to wrap tightly around every floated box on this page proving that line boxes shorten and then re-widen once the float has been passed by the flowing text below it. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while the five boxing wizards jump quickly and pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs so the layout engine has plenty of prose to wrap tightly around every floated box on this page proving that line boxes shorten and then re-widen once the float has been passed by the flowing text below it.

This cleared block starts below every float above it.
